plan.failureSummary: The deterministic execution failed because the cached selectors (specifically targeting the combobox 'Select your occupation') do not match the current form layout, which instead contains an 'Age Group' radio group.

remediationSteps.summary: Clear the page.ai cache and retry the test
remediationSteps.details: Clear the deterministic cache to force the autonomous page.ai agent to inspect the current DOM and correctly fill out the 'Age Group' form.

remediationSteps.summary: Disable deterministic cache/mode for this dynamic test
remediationSteps.details: Disable deterministic execution mode or cache for this test. Since the survey alternates form layouts dynamically, it requires autonomous evaluation on every run rather than relying on cached selectors.

plan.notes: The website (unstable-survey) dynamically alternates form fields between runs. This explains the alternating SUCCESS/FAILED pattern in the run history (approx 63% pass rate). Deterministic mode is fundamentally unsuitable for forms with alternating layouts, as the cached actions cannot adapt to the structural changes. Disabling deterministic mode/cache for this specific test will allow the autonomous agent to successfully fill out whichever form variant is presented.
